name: The New Order of the Stone
description:
After the Adventures of Sky City and the White Pumpkin’s mansion, the Order of the Stone finds themselves lost in the Portal Network

(Tags: Minecraft Story Mode, MCSM)

Ever since Jesse and his friends discovered the enchanted flint and steel in a long-forgotten jungle temple, the Order of the Stone has been thrust into one perilous adventure after another. From confronting the hostile Blaze Rods—Aiden and Blaze Rods who sought power at any cost—to resolving the political conflict between the Builders and Order in Sky City, the group has faced challenges that tested their courage.

Their journey didn't end there. The Order soon found themselves trapped in a mysterious series of alternate dimensions, hopping from portal to portal in search of a way home. Along the way, they were pulled into a deadly mystery in a spooky mansion, where a masked figure known as the White Pumpkin set up traps for their “guests”—forcing the Order and the YouTuber guests to solve the murders before they became the next victims.

Though they gained experience, the endless journey through strange worlds began to take its toll. Weary and homesick, the team longed to return to their world. That’s when they stumbled upon a portal unlike any they had seen before—glowing with unfamiliar energy and etched with strange symbols. With no other clear path forward and hope flickering in their hearts, the Order stepped through the portal… not knowing what awaited on the other side.

Common bot problems/complaints and how to deal with it:

“The bot talks for me.” That’s the JLLM’s (or proxy’s) problem and not with my bots. Before I used to add bot prompts in the personality section but I realized it would contradict with the User’s advanced prompts. I would recommend using an advanced prompts or sending longer replies since the bot fills information when short replies are sent. (Use “Enhance Message” if you don’t know how to write long replies.)

“I don’t like how the bot is Second Person POV.” I know people have preferences on writing styles but if you prefer 3rd person, you can edit out the “you” by replacing it with {{User}}. This can also be used when the bot’s replies uses 1st person POV which sometimes happens to me.

Bot Suggestions: If you want me to make a bot, you can suggest it in this forum. Note that not every suggestion will be made into a bot.

Here
creator: RogueTemplar
